title: lannea cinerea
intro: Lannea cinerea is a plant species that belongs to the family Anacardiaceae, commonly known as the cashew family, and is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in various medicinal applications, particularly in West Africa, where it is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lannea cinerea include its ability to treat fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce inflammation. Lannea cinerea is often prepared as a herbal decoction, infusion, or paste, and can also be used in the form of a traditional medicine or a natural remedy for various health issues.
